string.text:
Modernized sniper system based on the Mosin rifle, redesigned for use in anomalous zones. Equipped with a reinforced chrome-lined barrel (service life: 2500+ shots) and a modular platform for tactical upgrades. Uses 7.62x54 mm ammunition, with support for armor-piercing and thermobaric modifications.
 Integrated recoil suppression system "Compensator-D2" allows for accurate fire without loss of control.

 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2]Scopes: All optical sights compatible with Picatinny rail mounts.

 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2]Suppressors: "Rotor-7M"
